title: Marketplace Manager - Tata CLiQ Capital India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Tata CLiQ Capital India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Tata CLiQ Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata CLiQ Capital India:
Tata CLiQ Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ Capital India!
